perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A female character wearing a grey beanie and a white t-shirt with a grey pattern stands in an outdoor street setting. She is holding a small black microphone accessory and begins speaking while gesturing with her free hand. (2) She continues her monologue, her facial expressions shifting between serious contemplation and light laughter. She uses frequent hand gestures to emphasize her points. (3) The scene remains static as she concludes her speech, maintaining eye contact with the camera and smiling briefly at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins speaking in Mandarin with a clear, conversational, and slightly assertive tone. Faint ambient outdoor noise like distant traffic is audible. (2) The vocal pace remains steady as she presents her argument, punctuated by short, light laughs that suggest a satirical or humorous undertone. (3) The monologue concludes with a final statement and a soft chuckle, while the ambient street noise continues consistently until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '歷史是很重要的！' (History is very important!) - serious tone. (2) Functional Text: '你知道政府總是想騙我們!!' (You know the government always wants to lie to us!!) - provocative tone. (3) Functional Text: '我說「以前」~' (I said 'before'~) - clarifying tone. (4) Functional Text: '所以我們可以從以前的歷史' (So we can from past history) - logical tone. (5) Functional Text: '可以去看現在我們到底是不是愚民?!' (go see if we are really ignorant people now?!) - critical tone. (6) Functional Text: '還自以為自己很聰明??' (Still think we are smart??) - sarcastic tone. (7) Functional Text: '至於誰是愚民?還是誰是聰明的人民?' (As for who are ignorant people? Or who are smart people?) - analytical tone. (8) Functional Text: '我剛剛已經講得很清楚了...' (I have already explained it clearly...) - assertive tone. (9) Functional Text: '不清楚可以再看一遍!' (If not clear, watch it again!) - inviting tone. Decorative Text: 'www.patreon.com/c/nanaphoto' and 'youtube 星光奈奈' appear at the top throughout.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator appearing on screen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A female with short dark hair, wearing a grey textured beanie, a white t-shirt with a grey graphic print, and a black equipment harness.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An outdoor urban setting featuring a large agave-like plant in the foreground and a street with parked cars and buildings in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a social commentary piece where the creator uses the concept of history as a lens to critique government transparency and public awareness. By questioning whether the audience is 'ignorant' or 'smart,' she encourages critical thinking and historical literacy. The ultimate goal is to build engagement through provocative social and political discourse.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No specific product or service is promoted; the content is purely commentary.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The use of high-contrast, large-font Traditional Chinese captions and a direct-to-camera outdoor speaking style is characteristic of the creator 'Starlight Nana'.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on text overlays to reinforce its message, a common technique for vertical social media videos meant to be watched with or without sound.
